title: Minecraft Trailer Vibes
description: This modpack aims to get the vibes from the Minecraft Trailers. The modpack even includes optimization!
body: This modpack aims to get the vibes from the official Minecraft Trailers. The modpack includes optimization, and many mods to obtain the minecraft trailer vibe we all love. This modpack will be updated regularly, and in the future will have more and more QOL mods as well as better optimization.
